PLAINTIFF LILY CHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANTS CITY OF DALY CITY AND JOHN LUIS WHEELER IN THE SUM OF TWO THOUSAND FIVE HUNDERD DOLLARS ($2,500.00).
